name: construction contractors processing 5–15 permit applications/month tool
description: For construction contractors processing 5–15 permit applications/month, manual submission causes project delays. We convert project plans into digital permit applications instead of manual submission of paper applications.
problem_solved: Manual permit application processes lead to delays in project timelines.
features: simple form input for project details
